proposal1.heroHeadline: Myframeshift is losing over 1,000 hours a year on proposals. Here’s exactly where it goes.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Currently, crafting a bespoke proposal takes hours. With our system, it’s 47 seconds to a client-ready document.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Each of the following issues is a direct drain on Myframeshift's resources and potential revenue.

problems.title: Time Consumed
problems.description: Myframeshift spends over 20 hours weekly on proposal writing. This is time not spent acquiring new clients.

problems.title: Lost Deals
problems.description: Delayed proposals mean potential clients receive responses days late. Each lost client could mean a $10,000 annual revenue loss.

problems.title: Inconsistent Branding
problems.description: Manual proposals often miss the mark on branding. Inconsistency can cost Myframeshift credibility and trust, leading to fewer conversions.

problems.title: Error-Prone Processes
problems.description: Human error in manual proposals can lead to costly mistakes. Each error can result in a loss of up to 15% in deal values.

problems.title: Resource Drain
problems.description: High-skill employees are stuck doing low-value tasks. This results in a $50,000 annual loss in productivity.

problems.title: Competitor Advantage
problems.description: Competitors using automation respond faster. Each delay gives them an edge, costing Myframeshift countless opportunities.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI automation system replaces every inefficiency outlined above.

solutions.title: Instant Proposal Generation
solutions.description: Currently, proposals take hours to draft. Our system delivers a complete proposal in under 60 seconds.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Manual methods can miss branding cues. Our AI ensures every proposal aligns perfectly with Myframeshift’s brand identity.

solutions.title: Error Reduction
solutions.description: Human errors in proposals are costly. Our system minimizes errors by automating data input and formatting.

solutions.title: Resource Optimization
solutions.description: High-value employees are tied up in drafting. With automation, they focus on strategic tasks and client interactions.

solutions.title: Competitive Edge
solutions.description: Current processes lag behind competitors. Our system ensures Myframeshift responds faster, securing more deals.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Greatoutdoorguides's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Greatoutdoorguides around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Myframeshift.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Elevate Acme Corp's Brand Presence with Myframeshift's Expertise.
proposal2.heroSubheadline: Implement a comprehensive strategy to transform your brand's digital footprint and convert potential leads into loyal customers.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Acme Corp is currently facing significant financial losses due to underperformance in key areas.

problems.title: Low Conversion Rates
problems.description: Every customer who clicks away from your site without purchasing is a missed revenue opportunity. This translates to thousands of dollars in potential sales lost monthly.

problems.title: Poor Brand Visibility
problems.description: Lack of visibility in search results means potential customers aren't finding you. This results in a 30% decrease in market reach.

problems.title: Inefficient Marketing Spend
problems.description: Marketing dollars are not yielding expected returns, leading to a 20% overspend on campaigns with minimal impact.

problems.title: Customer Engagement Decline
problems.description: A decrease in customer interaction across channels suggests a lack of engagement, costing you repeat business and referrals.

problems.title: Stagnant Growth
problems.description: Without innovative strategies, growth has plateaued, causing a potential loss of market share against dynamic competitors.

problems.title: Outdated Content Strategy
problems.description: Content that fails to engage or inform customers results in a 25% drop in site traffic and customer retention.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Myframeshift offers targeted solutions to address these losses and drive growth.

solutions.title: Digital Marketing Strategy
solutions.description: Enhance your online presence and drive conversion rates by implementing tailored digital marketing strategies.

solutions.title: Brand Visibility Enhancement
solutions.description: Improve your search engine rankings and brand visibility to capture a larger audience share.

solutions.title: Performance Analytics
solutions.description: Utilize data-driven insights to optimize marketing spend and boost ROI on advertising campaigns.

solutions.title: Customer Engagement Solutions
solutions.description: Implement strategies to increase customer interaction and loyalty, ensuring repeat business.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: Myframeshift stands out with its proven expertise and results-driven approach.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Methodologies
whyUsCards.description: Our strategies are backed by data and tailored to meet your specific business needs.

whyUsCards.title: Client-Centric Approach
whyUsCards.description: We prioritize your goals and work closely with you to achieve them.

whyUsCards.title: Results-Driven
whyUsCards.description: Our focus is on delivering measurable results that impact your bottom line.

whyUsCards.title: Industry Experts
whyUsCards.description: Our team consists of seasoned professionals with extensive experience in digital marketing.

proposal2.teamIntro: Our team is dedicated to driving success for Acme Corp.

team.name: there
team.bio: With a focus on leading strategy and client relationships, our Executive Director ensures that every project aligns with client goals.

proposal2.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Discovery & Strategy
process.description: We begin with a deep dive into your business and industry to craft a tailored strategy.

process.title: Implementation
process.description: Our team executes the strategy using best-in-class tools and techniques.

process.title: Optimization
process.description: We continuously monitor and optimize campaigns to ensure maximum effectiveness.

process.title: Review & Scale
process.description: The final phase involves reviewing results and planning for scalable growth.
